subagents.name: intent_triage
subagents.role: Classifies prompt intent, media mode, complexity, and routing needs.
subagents.when: Always available; selected for complex or forced subagent orchestration.

subagents.name: visual_director
subagents.role: Reviews subject hierarchy, composition, background support, and visual clarity.
subagents.when: Selected for complex prompts and subagents mode.

subagents.name: cinematographer
subagents.role: Reviews camera, lens, depth of field, motion, lighting, and film language.
subagents.when: Selected for cinematic prompts or high subagent budget.

subagents.name: layout_multiframe
subagents.role: Reviews storyboard, grid, before/after, contact sheet, and multi-frame layouts.

subagents.name: deliverable_designer
subagents.role: Reviews deliverable-specific hierarchy, hook, premium layout, safe margins, and platform fit.
subagents.when: Selected for premium, text-sensitive, or platform-specific deliverables such as posters, social/story posts, slides, mockups, and packaging.

subagents.name: reference_fidelity
subagents.role: Reviews source-image fidelity for identity, product shape, logos, labels, packaging artwork, and unchanged regions.
subagents.when: Selected when reference images are supplied or when the deliverable needs product, packaging, document, or brand preservation.

subagents.name: reference_researcher
subagents.role: Plans official or reputable product/place reference research, suggested queries, and source priorities without replacing user-provided details.
subagents.when: Selected when a real product, brand, venue, landmark, or place needs factual grounding.

subagents.name: localization
subagents.role: Keeps non-English prompts natural while preserving image-generation terminology.
subagents.when: Selected when target language is not English, or high subagent budget.

subagents.name: safety_policy
subagents.role: Reviews age, public figure, brand, character, and regulated-claim risks.
subagents.when: Selected for safety flags, strict/auto safety review, or high subagent budget.

subagents.name: prompt_critic
subagents.role: Scores prompt clarity, contradictions, completeness, and generation usefulness.
subagents.when: Selected when quality review passes are enabled.
